holdings.infoBox: FFF is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Meta Platforms stock at 6.60%, NVIDIA at 6.26%, Oracle at 5.99%, Dell Technologies at 5.59%, and Palantir Technologies at 5.52%.

overview.description: The Founders 100 ETF (FFF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund invests in 100 founder-led companies believed to be capable of generating superior expected risk-adjusted returns. The actively managed ETF does not limit its investments by country or market cap. FFF was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Founder.
